lines.text: With permits verified, you reach the payment step.
Here you see the escrow preview, the total amount for your job, held by Nguzo.
This is the trust layer. Your money sits with Nguzo as escrow, it is tracked, not released, until work is signed off.
You upload your T.T payment proof, the bank transfer confirmation, right here.
Then submit it. Our admin confirms the funds, and only then does the job move to execution.
This solves the oldest problem in this business, suppliers fear they won't be paid, clients fear they'll pay and get nothing.
Escrow removes both fears at once, the money is real and visible, but locked until the work is done.
The supplier knows the money is secured, you know it won't be released until the job is done. Everyone's protected.
